title: Selected work.
text:
Projects
  Selected work.
  
    Each project is a small case study: the question, the approach, and what changed
    because of the work.
  

  
    
      
        Python
        SQL
        Agentic AI
      
      Agentic Nurse
      An agentic AI prototype that surfaces early patient-deterioration alerts.
      
        Context
        Nurses need earlier signals of patient deterioration without adding manual monitoring load.
      
      
        Approach
        Translated nurse workflows into user stories, validated use cases with MIMIC-IV SQL views, and designed Python evaluation frameworks for accuracy, latency, and clinical safety.
      
      
        Outcome
        A Telegram-based alerting prototype backed by a tested evaluation harness for reliability and safety.
      
      View on GitHub →
    

    
      
        Python
        Excel
        Data Modeling
      
      Community Partners Databasing
      A queryable database and widget for nonprofit partner data.
      
        Context
        Nonprofit organization data at Morningstar was scattered and difficult to maintain.
      
      
        Approach
        Designed schemas and built a Python widget to query, update, add, and delete records synchronized with the data lake.
      
      
        Outcome
        A documented tool with user instructions that made partner data easy to maintain and access.
      
      View on GitHub →
    

    
      
        Python
        TensorFlow
        Keras
      
      Incremental Learning Model
      A deep-learning model that keeps learning as new images arrive.
      
        Context
        Image models degrade when new, distorted data appears over time.
      
      
        Approach
        Built a model supporting continuous updates, with data augmentation and a similarity index to identify distorted images.
      
      
        Outcome
        Reached 98.1% test accuracy, with the full model-development process documented.
      
      View on GitHub →

title: Turning data into insights, and insights into impact.
text:
Data · Business · AI
      Turning data into insights, and insights into impact.
      
        I'm Eesha — an MS Business Analytics student at UC San Diego, using data to
        improve reporting, streamline workflows, and turn complex information into
        clear, practical decisions for teams in Tech, FinTech, and beyond.
      
    
    
      
      "Data is only useful when it changes what someone decides next."
    
  

  
  
    Let's build something meaningful.
    
      → Email
      → LinkedIn
      → GitHub
      → Download resume

title: A working timeline.
text:
Experience
  A working timeline.

  
    
      Mar 2026 — Jun 2026
      AI Engineer
      Dhauz | QuantumRise — San Diego, CA
      
        In my MSBA capstone with Dhauz AI Consulting and QuantumRise, I work at the intersection
        of business requirements, healthcare workflows, and technical implementation. I translate
        nurse workflows into user stories, alert logic, and usability criteria for a Telegram-based
        AI prototype designed to support patient-deterioration monitoring. I also coordinate weekly
        agendas, presentations, and recap emails across client, partner, and UCSD stakeholders to
        align technical decisions with end-user needs and keep the project moving toward implementation.
      
      
        GenAI
        SQL
        Python
        AI Tools
      
    

    
      Apr 2023 — Jun 2025
      Data Analyst
      Morningstar DBRS — Chicago, IL
      
        Improved reporting workflows, data quality, and stakeholder visibility across structured
        finance teams. I standardized 20+ Tableau Prep workflows and dashboards by translating
        stakeholder reporting needs into reusable metrics, filters, and documentation — giving
        10+ teams self-service access to deal-inflow and issuance insights. I also validated SQL,
        Python, and Excel reporting workflows by reconciling source data to dashboard outputs,
        debugging metric inconsistencies, and improving trust in internal reporting.
      
      
        SQL
        Python
        Tableau
      
    

    
      Jul 2022 — Apr 2023
      Credit Ratings Analyst
      Morningstar DBRS — Chicago, IL
      
        Supported credit decision-making through quantitative financial analysis, scenario modeling,
        and disciplined quality checks. I performed 15+ cash-flow and scenario analyses across
        multiple commercial real estate property types under tight deadlines and high-volume deal
        flow, maintaining 99% accuracy across complex financial models through structured QA reviews
        and consistent validation of assumptions and outputs.
      
      
        Excel
        SQL
      
    

    
      Jun 2021 — Jul 2021
      Machine Learning Intern
      Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC)
      
        Supported an image-distortion recognition project focused on incremental learning and
        similarity-based image comparison. I developed a beta incremental-learning model using
        NumPy, Pandas, TensorFlow, and Keras to support continuous model updates as new image data
        was introduced, achieving 0.981 testing and 0.999 training accuracy. I also implemented a
        similarity-index approach to compare original and distorted images.
      
      
        Python
        TensorFlow
        Keras

title: I turn complex data into clear, practical decisions.
text:
About
  I turn complex data into clear, practical decisions.

  
    
      I'm a data and business analytics professional with experience using data to improve
      reporting, streamline workflows, and support stronger business decision-making. My
      background spans analytics, process improvement, and translating complex information
      into clear, practical insights that help teams solve operational and strategic problems.
    
    
      I'm currently pursuing my MS in Business Analytics at UC San Diego, where I'm continuing
      to build skills in machine learning, data-driven strategy, and applied AI. I'm especially
      interested in roles that combine technical analysis with business problem-solving.
    
    
      I'm drawn to how analytics, AI, and machine learning can strengthen operational efficiency,
      support strategy, and create measurable impact — particularly in Tech, FinTech, and
      Venture Capital.
    
  

  
    Email
    Resume
    LinkedIn
    GitHub
  

  How I think
  
    
      01
      Frame first
      Before touching data, get the business question right. What decision does this actually inform?
    
    
      02
      Structure the mess
      Clean, model, and pressure-test the data until the shape of the problem is obvious.
    
    
      03
      Communicate to act
      A chart that changes a decision beats a dashboard nobody opens. Write for the stakeholder, not the tool.

title: Curiosities thatshow up in my work.
text:
Hobbies
  Curiosities thatshow up in my work.
  
    These aren't unrelated to the analytical work — they're where I practice noticing
    patterns without a spreadsheet in front of me.
  

  
    
      Cooking & baking
      
        I've been cooking and baking since sixth grade, and I'm a big foodie — always trying new
        restaurants and dishes around San Diego. A few favorites: Seneca, Callie, Taco Stand,
        Din Tai Fung, and Ramen Nagi.
      
    
    
      Reading
      
        Fiction and mystery mostly, though I'm open to almost anything. Lately I've been drawn to
        books that help me step away from work and assignments for a bit.
      
    
    
      Art & sketching
      
        I started college as a studio arts major before switching to finance and data analytics,
        so painting and sketching have always been part of who I am — and creativity still shapes
        how I work.
      
    
    
      Gaming
      
        A big fan of video games — I've played all the Uncharted games, some Call of Duty, and
        especially love co-op adventures like It Takes Two, Split Fiction, Mario Kart, and Overcooked.
